published_source: OmniArch (arXiv:2502.xxxxx) reproduction of PDEBench FNO baseline
note: Exploratory result, excluded from headline 21+1+2 count. Vorticity-Poisson FNO with DST spectral conv at 512x512, nMSE finetune (ep 150 of in-progress 250). PDEBench Table 5 does not list FNO baseline for 2D Incompressible NS; baseline 0.2574 from OmniArch reproduction. Test-set nRMSE 0.2462 modestly beats the OmniArch reproduction baseline (1.046x); validation nRMSE 0.2444 used for model selection.

architecture.note: DST-based spectral conv with Poisson solve for streamfunction, InstanceNorm

bootstrap_ci_frobenius.note: Test 28 chunks store per-sample Frobenius nRMSE only; per-timestep recompute from full tensors infeasible (~26 GB).
